unit.note: server vitest 176 files / 2041 passed + 1 skipped (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). Adds snapshot-preserve.test.ts (8 helper unit tests) + pty-manager-flush-preserve.test.ts (4 integration tests). Production: new snapshot-preserve.ts (126 LOC) holds the shared ADR-096 gate; pty-manager.ts 1214->1186 (SHRANK 28, no baseline ratchet) as finalizeMirrorSnapshot + flushMirrorSnapshot both delegate to writeSnapshotPreservingLarger. snapshot-store.ts untouched. No client/** change. tsc + oxlint clean; npm run build green.

integration.note: The pty-manager flush/finalize integration IS exercised by pty-manager-flush-preserve.test.ts through the real HeadlessMirror serialize -> real SnapshotStore disk write/read round-trip (Vitest, counted under unit). No separate HTTP-route surface changed.

e2e.note: No E2E. Pure server-side snapshot-persistence decision (which payload bytes persist); snapshot envelope format byte-identical so the replay-on-attach consumer contract is unchanged. detect_frontend_changes reports has_frontend_changes=false (no client/** touched). surface: none (see surface_verification + ADR F0.5 justification).

surface_verification.justification: Server-side snapshot-persistence decision (which payload bytes get written to the on-disk snapshot). No client/** file changed; snapshot envelope format byte-identical, so the replay-on-attach consumer contract is unchanged. Proven by a deterministic server-side Vitest guard (RED on pre-fix flush, green after) + a real-disk producer->file->consumer round-trip probe. A browser E2E cannot deterministically reproduce the DECRST-1049 alt-screen-clear + 2nd-detach timing that triggers the bug.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 - a shared helper (writeSnapshotPreservingLarger) encapsulates the ADR-096 gate and BOTH write surfaces call it; pty-manager.ts does not ratchet its bloat baseline
behaviors.evidence: snapshot-preserve.test.ts (8 tests, 16/16 stmts + 11/11 branches covered). Both call sites hit in coverage json: pty-manager.ts L874 (flush) 14 hits, L1024 (finalize) 27 hits. pty-manager.ts 1214->1186 (shrank 28); snapshot-store.ts 511 unchanged; new module 126<300.

behaviors.behavior: AC2 (RED-first) - a thin flush PRESERVES a richer on-disk snapshot
behaviors.evidence: pty-manager-flush-preserve.test.ts 'PRESERVES a richer on-disk snapshot when the flushed mirror is thin'. RED on pre-fix flush (unconditional write): expect(onDiskAfter.data).toBe(largePayload) failed - received '$ \u001b[?25h' (thin serialize) vs expected 2000-byte payload. GREEN after the helper call restored.

behaviors.behavior: AC3 - a richer flush payload DOES overwrite a thin on-disk snapshot (gate skips only the substantially-smaller case)
behaviors.evidence: pty-manager-flush-preserve.test.ts 'OVERWRITES a thin on-disk snapshot when the flushed mirror is richer' + helper unit tests (boundary at exactly 60% writes; larger overwrites).

behaviors.behavior: AC4 - flushMirrorSnapshot does NOT dispose the mirror even when the gate SKIPS (CLAUDE.md rule 21 / ADR-092 keep-alive)
behaviors.evidence: pty-manager-flush-preserve.test.ts 'does NOT dispose the mirror when the gate skips the write (rule 21)': after a skip, serializeMirrorIfLive returns a record AND a fresh emit still mirrors (a disposed mirror would return null / not update).

behaviors.behavior: AC5 - finalizeMirrorSnapshot behaves identically after the extraction (symmetry)
behaviors.evidence: pty-manager-flush-preserve.test.ts finalize-symmetry test (thin finalize preserves rich disk snapshot) + the pre-existing pty-manager-live-snapshot.test.ts H.1-H.6 finalize suite still green.

behaviors.behavior: Full existing server suite stays green; build + tsc + oxlint clean
behaviors.evidence: 176 files / 2041 passed + 1 skipped (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). npm run build exit 0. tsc --noEmit exit 0. oxlint exit 0 (changed files clean).

behaviors.behavior: Diff-coverage hard gate (>=80%) - every changed production line covered
behaviors.evidence: snapshot-preserve.ts 100% (16/16 stmts, 11/11 branches, 2/2 funcs). The two new pty-manager.ts executable lines both hit: L874 (flush helper call) 14 hits, L1024 (finalize helper call) 27 hits. 100% on changed lines, above the 80% gate.

behaviors.behavior: Confidence calibration (medium + replay/io-boundary) - real-disk producer->file->consumer round-trip
behaviors.evidence: Throwaway probe against built dist/ SnapshotStore, 4/4 PASS: seed-rich->flush-thin->read PRESERVED; seed-thin->flush-rich->read OVERWRITTEN; corrupt envelope->read throws->best-effort WRITE; exact-60% boundary->WRITE. warn skip/read-fail lines fired with correct byte counts. Probe set 1 (RED-first) found the bug; sets 2-3 clean -> asymptote reached.

test_completeness.note: 5 ACs (AC1-AC5) from the iterate spec: AC1 shared-helper + no-ratchet, AC2 RED-first preserve, AC3 overwrite, AC4 no-dispose (rule 21), AC5 finalize symmetry; plus the full-suite/build gate, the hard diff-coverage gate, and the medium/replay-boundary calibration probe. Each AC maps to >=1 committed Vitest behavior; AC2 is RED-first proven.
